narrative:
Cols 79-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 764 registered voters, with 64.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.1 percentage points.
